nasb.text: This man was listening to Paul as he spoke, who, when he had fixed his gaze on him and had seen that he had faith to be made well,

esv.text: He listened to Paul speaking. And Paul, looking intently at him and seeing that he had faith to be made well,

cnv.text: 他聽保羅講道；保羅注視他，見他有信心，可以治好，

ccb.text: 他也听保罗讲道。保罗定睛看他，见这个人有信心，可以得医治，

csbs.text: 这个人听保罗讲道。保罗注视着他，见他存着信可得救治，
